sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16936" key="a)taburi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτᾱβῠρίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] ἄρτος,</foreign> a kind of <sense id="n16936.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loaf,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
